ddls:
CREATE TABLE "films" (
  "film_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each film */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the film */,
  "release_year" INTEGER /* Year the film was released */,
  "rental_rate" REAL /* Rental rate for the film */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating of the film (e.g., PG, G, NC-17) */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the genre of the film */,
  "director" TEXT /* Name of the film director */,
  "producer" TEXT /* Name of the film producer */,
  "runtime_minutes" INTEGER /* Duration of the film in minutes */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the film */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the film */,
  "subtitle_language" TEXT /* Subtitle language available */,
  "availability_status" TEXT /* Current availability status (e.g., available, out of stock) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("film_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_films_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre (e.g., Action, Comedy, Drama) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the customer account was created */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the customer */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the customer */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the customer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "membership_status" TEXT /* Customer's membership status (e.g., regular, premium) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rentals" (
  "rental_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rental transaction */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film being rented */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer renting the film */,
  "rental_date" TEXT /* Date when the film was rented */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date when the film was returned */,
  "late_fee" REAL /* Late fee incurred (if any) */,
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* ID of the staff member who processed the rental */,
  "rental_status" TEXT /* Status of the rental (e.g., active, returned, overdue) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the rental (e.g., credit card, cash) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rental_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rentals_staff_id FOREIGN KEY ("staff_id") REFERENCES staff ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rentals_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rentals_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film being reviewed */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer (1-5 scale) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment provided by the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the review was created */,
  "is_approved" INTEGER /* Indicates if the review has been approved by a staff member */,
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* ID of the staff member who approved the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_staff_id FOREIGN KEY ("staff_id") REFERENCES staff ("staff_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "staff" (
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each staff member */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the staff member */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the staff member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the staff member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the staff member (e.g., admin, customer service) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the staff member */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the staff member */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the staff member */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the staff member */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the staff member */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the staff member */,
  "date_employed" TEXT /* Date when the staff member was employed */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotions" (
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotion */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film associated with the promotion */,
  "discount_rate" REAL /* Discount rate offered for the promotion */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the promotion */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the promotion */,
  "promotion_name" TEXT /* Name of the promotion */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the promotion */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the promotion is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promotion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_promotions_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id")
)
